chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ مَنْ حَافَ فِي الْوَصِيَّةِ فَلِلْوَصِيِّ أَنْ يَرُدَّهَا إِلَى الْحَقِّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 14 – If one is unjust in the bequest, so it is for the executor that he returns it to the right

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/34)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/34)
text: قَالَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَطْلَقَ لِلْمُوصَى إِلَيْهِ أَنْ يُغَيِّرَ الْوَصِيَّةَ إِذَا لَمْ يَكُنْ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ وَ كَانَ فِيهَا حَيْفٌ وَ يَرُدَّهَا إِلَى الْمَعْرُوفِ لِقَوْلِهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَمَنْ خافَ مِنْ مُوصٍ جَنَفاً أَوْ إِثْماً فَأَصْلَحَ بَيْنَهُمْ فَلا إِثْمَ عَلَيْهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from his men who said,

Heasws said: ‘Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic has Released it for the executor that he can change the bequest when it does not happen to be with the goodness, and there was injustice in it, and return it to the goodness, due to Hisazwj Words, the Mighty and Majestic [2:182] But he who fears an inclination to a wrong course or an act of disobedience on the part of the testator, and effects an agreement between the parties, there is no blame on him’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from his people who have said the following: “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, has given permission to the executor of the will to change a will into an acceptable form if any violation of the law exists in it. It is because of the meaning of the words of Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious. ‘One who is afraid of the testator’s deviations and sin and settles the matter among the parties involved, he has not committed a sin. Allah is All-forgiving and All-merciful. 5 ” [2:182]
